# highlight-data — Changelog

> Diff structurel de l'API (selectors, inputs, outputs, models) entre versions stables, jusqu'à `v21.2.2`. Les versions sans changement d'API sont omises.

## 21.1.3

~ `illustration` : 'calculator' | 'calendar' | 'cleemy-card' | 'coffee' | 'headphone' | 'mail' | 'manifying-glass' | 'medallon' | 'piggy-bank' | 'polaroid-female' | 'polaroid-male' | 'polaroids' | string → IllustrationType

## 21.0.3

+ `heading` : PortalContent (requis)
+ `value` : PortalContent (requis)
+ `subText` : PortalContent
+ `bubble` : 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | number
+ `theme` : 'white' | 'light' | 'dark'
+ `palette` : 'lucca' | 'cleemy' | 'timmi' | 'poplee' | 'coreHR' | 'pagga' | 'cc' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'critical' | string
+ `illustration` : 'calculator' | 'calendar' | 'cleemy-card' | 'coffee' | 'headphone' | 'mail' | 'manifying-glass' | 'medallon' | 'piggy-bank' | 'polaroid-female' | 'polaroid-male' | 'polaroids' | string
+ `size` : 'XS' | 'S' | 'M' | null
+ `valueFirst` : boolean
+ `nested` : boolean

## 21.0.0

Composant introduit (`HighlightDataComponent`).

## Notes de release (ZeroHeight)
